subcodes.title: Words to Mr Briggs, spoken on 1914-03-09
subcodes.first_line: The humane principles of Bahá'u'lláh have enlightened the East. They have laid waste to the foundation of prejudices.
subcodes.subjects: @oneness; unity of religion, @stories; anecdotes, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @unity in diversity, @universality of the Cause, @teaching one's self first in teaching the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity
